mapper.sql: spit.id, spit.income_period, spit.tax_period, spit.work_card, spit.employee_name, spit.month_income, spit.amount_income, spit.amount_social_insurance_deduct, spit.amount_accumulation_fund_deduct, spit.amount_special_additional_deduct, spit.amount_starting_point_deduct, spit.amount_deduct_expenses, spit.amount_taxable_income, spit.tax_rate, spit.quick_calculation_deduction, spit.amount_tax_due, spit.amount_tax_paid, spit.amount_tax_refund, spit.create_time, spit.create_by, spit.update_time, spit.update_by, spit.se_id, spit.enabled_flag, spit.amount_flag

${tAlias}.id as ${tAlias}_id, ${tAlias}.income_period as ${tAlias}_income_period, ${tAlias}.tax_period as ${tAlias}_tax_period, ${tAlias}.work_card as ${tAlias}_work_card, ${tAlias}.employee_name as ${tAlias}_employee_name, ${tAlias}.month_income as ${tAlias}_month_income, ${tAlias}.amount_income as ${tAlias}_amount_income, ${tAlias}.amount_social_insurance_deduct as ${tAlias}_amount_social_insurance_deduct, ${tAlias}.amount_accumulation_fund_deduct as ${tAlias}_amount_accumulation_fund_deduct, ${tAlias}.amount_special_additional_deduct as ${tAlias}_amount_special_additional_deduct, ${tAlias}.amount_starting_point_deduct as ${tAlias}_amount_starting_point_deduct, ${tAlias}.amount_deduct_expenses as ${tAlias}_amount_deduct_expenses, ${tAlias}.amount_taxable_income as ${tAlias}_amount_taxable_income, ${tAlias}.tax_rate as ${tAlias}_tax_rate, ${tAlias}.quick_calculation_deduction as ${tAlias}_quick_calculation_deduction, ${tAlias}.amount_tax_due as ${tAlias}_amount_tax_due, ${tAlias}.amount_tax_paid as ${tAlias}_amount_tax_paid, ${tAlias}.amount_tax_refund as ${tAlias}_amount_tax_refund, ${tAlias}.create_time as ${tAlias}_create_time, ${tAlias}.create_by as ${tAlias}_create_by, ${tAlias}.update_time as ${tAlias}_update_time, ${tAlias}.update_by as ${tAlias}_update_by, ${tAlias}.se_id as ${tAlias}_se_id, ${tAlias}.enabled_flag as ${tAlias}_enabled_flag, ${tAlias}.amount_flag as ${tAlias}_amount_flag
mapper.insert: insert into swm_personal_income_tax (income_period, tax_period, work_card, employee_name, month_income, amount_income, amount_social_insurance_deduct, amount_accumulation_fund_deduct, amount_special_additional_deduct, amount_starting_point_deduct, amount_deduct_expenses, amount_taxable_income, tax_rate, quick_calculation_deduction, amount_tax_due, amount_tax_paid, amount_tax_refund, create_time, create_by, update_time, update_by, se_id, enabled_flag) values (#{incomePeriod,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{taxPeriod,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{workCard,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{employeeName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{monthIncome,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{amountIncome,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{amountSocialInsuranceDeduct,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{amountAccumulationFundDeduct,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{amountSpecialAdditionalDeduct,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{amountStartingPointDeduct,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{amountDeductExpenses,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{amountTaxableIncome,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{taxRate,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{quickCalculationDeduction,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{amountTaxDue,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{amountTaxPaid,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{amountTaxRefund,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{createBy,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{updateBy,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{seId, jdbcType= BIGINT}, #{enabledFlag, jdbcType = BIT})
mapper.select: select top 1 spit.income_period from swm_personal_income_tax spit where spit.enabled_flag = 1 order by spit.id desc
mapper.update: update swm_personal_income_tax set enabled_flag = 0 where income_period = #{incomePeriod, jdbcType = VARCHAR} and enabled_flag = 1 and amount_flag = #{amountFlag, jdbcType = BIT}

update swm_personal_income_tax set income_period = #{incomePeriod,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, tax_period = #{taxPeriod,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, work_card = #{workCard,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, employee_name = #{employeeName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, month_income = #{monthIncome,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, amount_income = #{amountIncome,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, amount_social_insurance_deduct = #{amountSocialInsuranceDeduct,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, amount_accumulation_fund_deduct = #{amountAccumulationFundDeduct,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, amount_special_additional_deduct = #{amountSpecialAdditionalDeduct,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, amount_starting_point_deduct = #{amountStartingPointDeduct,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, amount_deduct_expenses = #{amountDeductExpenses,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, amount_taxable_income = #{amountTaxableIncome,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, tax_rate = #{taxRate,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, quick_calculation_deduction = #{quickCalculationDeduction,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, amount_tax_due = #{amountTaxDue,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, amount_tax_paid = #{amountTaxPaid,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, amount_tax_refund = #{amountTaxRefund,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, update_by = #{updateBy,jdbcType=BIGINT}, se_id = #{seId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, enabled_flag = #{enabledFlag, jdbcType = BIT} where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}
mapper.select:
select
from swm_personal_income_tax spit join swm_employee se on spit.se_id = se.id and se.work_flag = 1 and exists ( select 1 from pm_employee pe join fnd_user fu on fu.employee_id = pe.id and pe.enabled_flag = 1 and fu.enabled_flag = 1 and fu.id = #{userId, jdbcType = BIGINT} and pe.id = se.employee_id ) and spit.enabled_flag = 1 order by spit.income_period
mapper.insert: insert into swm_personal_income_tax( month_income, amount_income, work_card,employee_name,amount_taxable_income, tax_rate,quick_calculation_deduction,amount_tax_due,amount_tax_refund, create_time, create_by, update_time, update_by, se_id, enabled_flag, income_period, tax_period, amount_flag ) select spiti.month_income, spiti.amount_income, RIGHT ( CAST ( '000000' + rtrim( spiti.work_card ) AS VARCHAR ), 6 ), spiti.employee_name,spiti.amount_taxable_income, spiti.tax_rate,spiti.quick_calculation_deduction,spiti.amount_tax_due,spiti.amount_tax_refund, spiti.create_time, spiti.create_by, spiti.update_time, spiti.update_by, (SELECT isnull( se.id, - 1 ) FROM swm_employee se WHERE se.employee_id = spiti.employee_id AND se.work_flag = 1 ), 1, spiti.income_period, spiti.tax_period, 0 FROM swm_personal_income_tax_interface spiti WHERE spiti.group_id = #{groupId, jdbcType = BIGINT} AND spiti.employee_id != - 1 AND spiti.data_status = 'T'

INSERT INTO swm_personal_income_tax ( amount_deduct_expenses, income_period, tax_period, work_card, employee_name, month_income, amount_income, amount_social_insurance_deduct, amount_accumulation_fund_deduct, amount_special_additional_deduct, amount_starting_point_deduct, amount_taxable_income, tax_rate, quick_calculation_deduction, amount_tax_due, amount_tax_paid, amount_tax_refund, create_time, create_by, update_time, update_by, se_id, enabled_flag ) select (isnull(round(tempx.amount_social_insurance_deduct, 2), 0) + isnull(round(tempx.amount_accumulation_fund_deduct, 2),0) + isnull(round(tempx.amount_special_additional_deduct, 2), 0) + isnull(round(tempx.amount_starting_point_deduct,2), 0)), tempx.income_period, tempx.tax_period, tempx.work_card, tempx.employee_name, tempx.month_income, tempx.amount_income, isnull(tempx.amount_social_insurance_deduct, 0), isnull(tempx.amount_accumulation_fund_deduct, 0), isnull(tempx.amount_special_additional_deduct, 0), isnull(tempx.amount_starting_point_deduct, 0), tempx.amount_taxable_income, tempx.tax_rate, tempx.quick_calculation_deduction, tempx.amount_tax_due, tempx.amount_tax_paid, tempx.amount_tax_refund, tempx.create_time, tempx.create_by, tempx.update_time, tempx.update_by, tempx.se_id, 1
from (SELECT spiti.income_period as income_period, spiti.tax_period as tax_period, RIGHT ( CAST ( '000000' + rtrim( spiti.work_card ) AS VARCHAR ), 6 ) as work_card, spiti.employee_name as employee_name, spiti.month_income as month_income, spiti.amount_income as amount_income, isnull(spiti.current_basic_pension_insurance,0) + isnull(spiti.current_basic_medical, 0) + isnull(spiti.current_unemployment, 0) + case when CAST ( RIGHT ( spiti.income_period, 2 ) AS INT ) = 12 and CAST(RIGHT(spiti.tax_period, 2) as INT) = 1 then 0 else isnull(( SELECT isnull(temp.amount_social_insurance_deduct, 0) FROM swm_personal_income_tax temp WHERE temp.income_period = ( case when CAST ( RIGHT ( spiti.income_period, 2 ) AS INT ) = 1 then convert(varchar(4), cast(LEFT(spiti.income_period, 4) as int) - 1) + '.12' else LEFT(spiti.income_period, 4) + '.' + case when CAST ( RIGHT ( spiti.income_period, 2 ) AS INT ) < 11 then '0' + convert(varchar(1), CAST ( RIGHT ( spiti.income_period, 2 ) AS INT ) - 1) else convert(varchar(2), CAST ( RIGHT ( spiti.income_period, 2 ) AS INT ) - 1) end end ) AND temp.enabled_flag = 1 And temp.amount_flag = 1 AND RIGHT ( CAST ( '000000' + rtrim( temp.work_card ) AS VARCHAR ), 6 ) = RIGHT ( CAST ( '000000' + rtrim( spiti.work_card ) AS VARCHAR ), 6 ) ),0) end as amount_social_insurance_deduct, spiti.current_housing_accumulation_fund + case when CAST ( RIGHT ( spiti.income_period, 2 ) AS INT ) = 12 and CAST(RIGHT(spiti.tax_period, 2) as INT) = 1 then 0 else isnull(( SELECT isnull(temp.amount_accumulation_fund_deduct, 0) FROM swm_personal_income_tax temp WHERE temp.income_period = ( case when CAST ( RIGHT ( spiti.income_period, 2 ) AS INT ) = 1 then convert(varchar(4), cast(LEFT(spiti.income_period, 4) as int) - 1) + '.12' else LEFT(spiti.income_period, 4) + '.' + case when CAST ( RIGHT ( spiti.income_period, 2 ) AS INT ) < 11 then '0' + convert(varchar(1), CAST ( RIGHT ( spiti.income_period, 2 ) AS INT ) - 1) else convert(varchar(2), CAST ( RIGHT ( spiti.income_period, 2 ) AS INT ) - 1) end end ) and temp.enabled_flag = 1 and temp.amount_flag = 1 AND RIGHT ( CAST ( '000000' + rtrim( temp.work_card ) AS VARCHAR ), 6 ) = RIGHT ( CAST ( '000000' + rtrim( spiti.work_card ) AS VARCHAR ), 6 ) ),0) end as amount_accumulation_fund_deduct, isnull(round(spiti.deduct_sum_child_education,2), 0) + isnull(round(spiti.deduct_sum_education_continue,2),0) + isnull(round(spiti.deduct_sum_house_loan,2), 0) + isnull(round(spiti.deduct_sum_housing_rental,2), 0) + isnull(round(spiti.deduct_sum_support_elderly,2), 0) + isnull(round(spiti.deduct_sum_three_child,2), 0) as amount_special_additional_deduct, isnull(spiti.amount_deduct_expenses, 0) as amount_starting_point_deduct, isnull(spiti.amount_taxable_income, 0) as amount_taxable_income, spiti.tax_rate as tax_rate, spiti.quick_calculation_deduction as quick_calculation_deduction, spiti.amount_tax_due as amount_tax_due , spiti.amount_tax_paid as amount_tax_paid, spiti.amount_tax_refund as amount_tax_refund, spiti.create_time as create_time, spiti.create_by as create_by, spiti.update_time as update_time, spiti.update_by as update_by, (SELECT isnull( se.id, - 1 ) FROM swm_employee se WHERE se.employee_id = spiti.employee_id AND se.work_flag = 1 ) as se_id FROM swm_personal_income_tax_interface spiti WHERE spiti.group_id = #{groupId, jdbcType = BIGINT} AND spiti.employee_id != - 1 AND spiti.data_status = 'T' ) as tempx
